title: parse_sapling_address: Orchard-only UA mapped to InvalidRecipient not UnsupportedAddressType
description: Trigger: caller passes a Unified Address whose only receiver is Orchard (no Sapling receiver). Expected: TxBuildError::UnsupportedAddressType (the address parsed successfully, it just lacks a Sapling receiver). Actual: TxBuildError::InvalidRecipient (implies the string was unparseable garbage). In parse_sapling_address, the ConversionError::User arm maps to InvalidRecipient. The enum's own doc says InvalidRecipient = 'could not be parsed as a Zcash address', while UnsupportedAddressType = 'parsed successfully but resolves to an unsupported protocol'. An Orchard-only UA parses correctly — it's the second case. Wrong error variant propagated to the user: 'invalid recipient address: Unified Address has no Sapling receiver' when the correct message would be 'unsupported address type: ...'.
